title: Independent HS2 Commissioner: personal information charter
body: "This charter contains the standards you can expect when the independent HS2 Commissioner ask for, or holds, your personal information. It also covers what the independent HS2 Commissioner asks of you, to help us keep information up to date.  This charter explains how the independent HS2 Commissioner will, as a data controller, comply with the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018.  "
